name: connectorplancheck
description: Dry-run review gate for agent connector action plans.

scripts.smoke: node bin/connectorplancheck.js --help && node bin/connectorplancheck.js --version && node bin/connectorplancheck.js fixtures/safe-plan.json --format markdown --out tmp/smoke.md && test -s tmp/smoke.md
scripts.release:check: npm run check && npm test && npm run build && npm run smoke && npm run package:smoke

author: Roger Chappel
